name: Sonner
description: Toast notification (named after the Sonner React lib). Conditional icon + title + description + action-button slots.

exposedProps.name: action
exposedProps.description: Reveal action button at right (Undo by default).

slots.name: description
slots.$tokenNote: References text-sm-leading-normal-normal which is in this bundle but not in tokens.json above — TBD inclusion.

slots.name: action
slots.$shadowNote: Uses shadow/xs (referenced but tokens not in get_variable_defs response — F26 nested-token leak).

container.$shadow: INLINE rgba(0,0,0,0.1) drop-shadow — NOT bound to a token. F26 audit candidate.

$new_audit_findings.F26: NEW (MEDIUM). Sonner container shadow is emitted as inline `shadow-[0px_4px_12px_-1px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)]` — NOT bound to a shadow/* token. Other Apollo components (Tabs) use `{shadow.sm}` properly. Source-DS audit: add `shadow/md` or `shadow/popover` token and rebind.
$new_audit_findings.F27: Action button uses `shadow/xs/*` primitives (offset-x, offset-y, blur-radius, color) but those tokens didn't appear in `get_variable_defs` on Sonner subtree — same nested-token leak class as Avatar Badge F-pattern.

$step2_known_gaps.field: Focus state styling — likely adds ring or border-color shift
